# learn-llm-ai-agent

This repository is a small learning collection for working with Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF), Ollama, LangChain, and agent-style notebook examples. The notebooks are meant for study and experimentation only.

# Important note:  All code in this repo is for learning and experimentation. The examples are assembled from public sources, internet references, or generated by AI tools. No code is copied from production code from real world system.


## .py and notebook briefly explain
???


## What this repo is for

- Learning how to use local Ollama models in Python.
- Exploring tool-enabled agent workflows.
- Trying out LangChain prompt and graph examples.
- Practicing with notebook-based experiments.
